mapper.insert: insert into sc_affair_ask_leave_record (request_id, request_no, applicant_user_id, template_code, business_type, leave_type, start_date, end_date, destination, emergency_contact, leave_request_no, actual_return_date, cancel_remark, reason, request_status, business_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{templateCode}, #{businessType}, #{leaveType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{destination}, #{emergencyContact}, #{leaveRequestNo}, #{actualReturnDate}, #{cancelRemark}, #{reason}, #{requestStatus}, #{businessSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), sysdate()) on duplicate key update request_no = values(request_no), applicant_user_id = values(applicant_user_id), template_code = values(template_code), business_type = values(business_type), leave_type = values(leave_type), start_date = values(start_date), end_date = values(end_date), destination = values(destination), emergency_contact = values(emergency_contact), leave_request_no = values(leave_request_no), actual_return_date = values(actual_return_date), cancel_remark = values(cancel_remark), reason = values(reason), request_status = values(request_status), business_snapshot_json = values(business_snapshot_json), update_time = sysdate()

insert into sc_affair_leave_return_record (request_id, request_no, applicant_user_id, template_code, business_type, leave_school_date, expected_return_date, location, health_status, leave_request_no, return_date, travel_summary, reason, request_status, business_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{templateCode}, #{businessType}, #{leaveSchoolDate}, #{expectedReturnDate}, #{location}, #{healthStatus}, #{leaveRequestNo}, #{returnDate}, #{travelSummary}, #{reason}, #{requestStatus}, #{businessSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), sysdate()) on duplicate key update request_no = values(request_no), applicant_user_id = values(applicant_user_id), template_code = values(template_code), business_type = values(business_type), leave_school_date = values(leave_school_date), expected_return_date = values(expected_return_date), location = values(location), health_status = values(health_status), leave_request_no = values(leave_request_no), return_date = values(return_date), travel_summary = values(travel_summary), reason = values(reason), request_status = values(request_status), business_snapshot_json = values(business_snapshot_json), update_time = sysdate()

insert into sc_affair_activity_record (request_id, request_no, applicant_user_id, template_code, activity_name, activity_date, venue, participant_count, mentor_teacher_id, mentor_teacher_name, reason, request_status, business_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{templateCode}, #{activityName}, #{activityDate}, #{venue}, #{participantCount}, #{mentorTeacherId}, #{mentorTeacherName}, #{reason}, #{requestStatus}, #{businessSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), sysdate()) on duplicate key update request_no = values(request_no), applicant_user_id = values(applicant_user_id), template_code = values(template_code), activity_name = values(activity_name), activity_date = values(activity_date), venue = values(venue), participant_count = values(participant_count), mentor_teacher_id = values(mentor_teacher_id), mentor_teacher_name = values(mentor_teacher_name), reason = values(reason), request_status = values(request_status), business_snapshot_json = values(business_snapshot_json), update_time = sysdate()

insert into sc_affair_competition_record (request_id, request_no, applicant_user_id, template_code, competition_name, competition_level, competition_date, mentor_teacher_id, mentor_teacher_name, team_info, reason, request_status, business_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{templateCode}, #{competitionName}, #{competitionLevel}, #{competitionDate}, #{mentorTeacherId}, #{mentorTeacherName}, #{teamInfo}, #{reason}, #{requestStatus}, #{businessSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), sysdate()) on duplicate key update request_no = values(request_no), applicant_user_id = values(applicant_user_id), template_code = values(template_code), competition_name = values(competition_name), competition_level = values(competition_level), competition_date = values(competition_date), mentor_teacher_id = values(mentor_teacher_id), mentor_teacher_name = values(mentor_teacher_name), team_info = values(team_info), reason = values(reason), request_status = values(request_status), business_snapshot_json = values(business_snapshot_json), update_time = sysdate()

insert into sc_affair_innovation_record (request_id, request_no, applicant_user_id, template_code, project_name, project_type, mentor_teacher_id, mentor_teacher_name, funding_need, reason, request_status, business_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{templateCode}, #{projectName}, #{projectType}, #{mentorTeacherId}, #{mentorTeacherName}, #{fundingNeed}, #{reason}, #{requestStatus}, #{businessSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), sysdate()) on duplicate key update request_no = values(request_no), applicant_user_id = values(applicant_user_id), template_code = values(template_code), project_name = values(project_name), project_type = values(project_type), mentor_teacher_id = values(mentor_teacher_id), mentor_teacher_name = values(mentor_teacher_name), funding_need = values(funding_need), reason = values(reason), request_status = values(request_status), business_snapshot_json = values(business_snapshot_json), update_time = sysdate()

insert into sc_affair_evaluation_record (request_id, request_no, applicant_user_id, template_code, evaluation_term, achievement_summary, volunteer_hours, reason, request_status, business_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{templateCode}, #{evaluationTerm}, #{achievementSummary}, #{volunteerHours}, #{reason}, #{requestStatus}, #{businessSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), sysdate()) on duplicate key update request_no = values(request_no), applicant_user_id = values(applicant_user_id), template_code = values(template_code), evaluation_term = values(evaluation_term), achievement_summary = values(achievement_summary), volunteer_hours = values(volunteer_hours), reason = values(reason), request_status = values(request_status), business_snapshot_json = values(business_snapshot_json), update_time = sysdate()

insert into sc_affair_textbook_record (request_id, request_no, applicant_user_id, template_code, textbook_type, course_name, isbn, quantity, reason, request_status, business_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{templateCode}, #{textbookType}, #{courseName}, #{isbn}, #{quantity}, #{reason}, #{requestStatus}, #{businessSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), sysdate()) on duplicate key update request_no = values(request_no), applicant_user_id = values(applicant_user_id), template_code = values(template_code), textbook_type = values(textbook_type), course_name = values(course_name), isbn = values(isbn), quantity = values(quantity), reason = values(reason), request_status = values(request_status), business_snapshot_json = values(business_snapshot_json), update_time = sysdate()

insert into sc_affair_academic_status_record (request_id, request_no, applicant_user_id, template_code, effective_date, expected_resume_date, target_major, recovery_proof, guardian_phone, before_status_code, before_status_name, after_status_code, after_status_name, reason, request_status, business_snapshot_json, create_time, update_time) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{applicantUserId}, #{templateCode}, #{effectiveDate}, #{expectedResumeDate}, #{targetMajor}, #{recoveryProof}, #{guardianPhone}, #{beforeStatusCode}, #{beforeStatusName}, #{afterStatusCode}, #{afterStatusName}, #{reason}, #{requestStatus}, #{businessSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), sysdate()) on duplicate key update request_no = values(request_no), applicant_user_id = values(applicant_user_id), template_code = values(template_code), effective_date = values(effective_date), expected_resume_date = values(expected_resume_date), target_major = values(target_major), recovery_proof = values(recovery_proof), guardian_phone = values(guardian_phone), before_status_code = values(before_status_code), before_status_name = values(before_status_name), after_status_code = values(after_status_code), after_status_name = values(after_status_name), reason = values(reason), request_status = values(request_status), business_snapshot_json = values(business_snapshot_json), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from sc_affair_activity_record where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
select * from sc_affair_ask_leave_record where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
select * from sc_affair_leave_return_record where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
select * from sc_affair_competition_record where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
select * from sc_affair_innovation_record where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
select * from sc_affair_evaluation_record where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
select * from sc_affair_textbook_record where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
select * from sc_affair_academic_status_record where request_id = #{requestId} limit 1
select * from sc_affair_textbook_record where applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} order by update_time desc, record_id desc
select * from sc_affair_academic_status_record where applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} order by update_time desc, record_id desc
select * from sc_affair_ask_leave_record where applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} order by update_time desc, record_id desc
select * from sc_affair_leave_return_record where applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} order by update_time desc, record_id desc

select r.*, u.nick_name as applicant_nick_name from sc_affair_textbook_record r left join sys_user u on r.applicant_user_id = u.user_id where r.isbn = #{isbn} and r.request_status = 'APPROVED' and r.textbook_type in ('CLAIM', 'REISSUE') order by r.update_time desc
